definitions.text: Up to the time of (something happening); pending.
examples: If you can wait until after my meeting with her, we'll talk then.
Keep walking until the second set of traffic lights, then turn left.

definitions.text: Up to the time that (a condition becomes true).
examples: Not until I got his email did I fully understand his disappointment.
It took us a week before/until we got the house repainted.
